identificationModule.briefTitle: Timely Recovery After Subclinical Heart Failure
identificationModule.officialTitle: Timely Recovery After Subclinical Heart Failure (TREASURE Trial)

collaborators.name: ZonMw: The Netherlands Organisation for Health Research and Development

armGroups.label: Intervention group (Perindopril 2 mg)
armGroups.description: Eligible subjects will be counselled and upon informed consent randomized for either medication or care as usual (i.e. no medication). After a complete cardiovascular assessment, medication will be initiated open-labeled (Perindopril 2 mg or no medication). In case of side effects Perindopril will be replaced by Valsartan 40 mg twice daily. A blood pressure below 120/80 mmHg is targeted. Blood pressure will be measured once per two weeks until the targeted blood pressure is achieved or until medication dosage has increased 4 times, corresponding Perindopril 10mg as maximum dosage or corresponding Valsartan 320mg (160 mg twice daily) as maximum dosage.

armGroups.label: Standard care group (i.e. no medication)
armGroups.description: Eligible subjects will be counselled and upon informed consent randomized for either medication or care as usual (i.e. no medication).

interventions.name: Perindopril
interventions.description: In case of side effects Perindopril will be replaced by Valsartan
